title: Charred Light Thai Som-Tum Taco Shells In Copper Mug
description: A romantic Thai dish featuring charred taco shells in a copper mug with a light and refreshing som-tum sauce, perfect for a unique appetizer or snack.
instructions: Toast the taco shells in a copper mug until they are lightly charred, about 6 minutes per side on high heat.
In a separate bowl, mix together tomato, cilantro, chili peppers, lime juice, fish sauce, and chicken broth. Add garlic cloves if using.
Serve hot with the charred taco shells as a topping or in individual serving dishes.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.

axes.dishForm: Som-Tum Taco Shells In Copper Mug
